creator: freebsd@skysmurf.nl
text:
Created attachment 144483
Patch to update the Makefile and distinfo.

The port games/xroach has been marked as broken due to missing/incorrect distinfo and has been orphaned. I fixed the distinfo and volunteer to take maintainership.

The attached patch sets MAINTAINER, updates distinfo and changes MASTER_SITE from MASTER_SITE_BACKUP to my own mirror.

The port has been checked with Portlint. The LICENSE remains unspecified, but I'll look into that after the staging storm has blown over.
